attributes.action: Honour Pep Guardiola with a Knighthood.
attributes.additional_details: Pep Guardiola came to English football ten years ago and has completely changed the way football as we know it is played today. Breaking records almost every season, 20 trophies in 10 years winning every trophy available in domestic football. Four league titles in a row, 100 points in a season. All achievements made possible because of his brilliant footballing mastermind. A true legend and leader demanding respect and the very best from his players. Something we will never see again
attributes.background:
Honour Pep Guardiola with a Knighthood for his services to football. 

What Pep has done over his ten year tenure at Manchester City has been truly remarkable. Breaking records almost every season, winning 4 titles in a row, never been done before.

rejection.details: I'm afraid we don't accept petitions about honours and appointments.
